heading: Definitions
label: 9051 Definitions

children.heading: Actual dairy production margin
children.label: 1 Actual dairy production margin
children.text: The term “actual dairy production margin” means the difference between the all-milk price and the average feed cost, as calculated under .section 9052 of this title

children.heading: All-milk price
children.label: 2 All-milk price
children.text: The term “all-milk price” means the average price received, per hundredweight of milk, by dairy operations for all milk sold to plants and dealers in the United States, as determined by the Secretary.

children.label: A
children.text: The product determined by multiplying 1.0728 by the price of corn per bushel.

children.label: B
children.text: The product determined by multiplying 0.00735 by the price of soybean meal per ton.

children.label: C
children.text: The product determined by multiplying 0.0137 by the price of alfalfa hay per ton.

children.label: i
children.text: shares in the risk of producing milk; and

children.label: ii
children.text: makes contributions (including land, labor, management, equipment, or capital) to the dairy operation of the individual or entity, which are at least commensurate with the individual or entity’s share of the proceeds of the operation.

children.heading: Additional ownership structures
children.label: B Additional ownership structures
children.text: The Secretary shall determine additional ownership structures to be covered by the definition of dairy operation.

children.heading: Dairy margin coverage
children.label: 5 Dairy margin coverage
children.text: The term “dairy margin coverage” means the dairy margin coverage program required by .section 9053 of this title

children.heading: Dairy margin coverage payment
children.label: 6 Dairy margin coverage payment
children.text: The term “dairy margin coverage payment” means a payment made to a participating dairy operation under dairy margin coverage pursuant to .section 9056 of this title

children.heading: Participating dairy operation
children.label: 7 Participating dairy operation
children.text: The term “participating dairy operation” means a dairy operation that registers under to participate in dairy margin coverage.section 9054 of this title

children.heading: Production history
children.label: 8 Production history
children.text: The term “production history” means the production history determined for a participating dairy operation under subsection (a) or (b) of .section 9055 of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 9 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.

children.heading: United States
children.label: 10 United States
children.text: The term “United States”, in a geographical sense, means the 50 States, the District of Columbia, American Samoa, Guam, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, the Virgin Islands of the United States, and any other territory or possession of the United States.
